proposal.summary: Implement a focused monster runtime system that drives monster states, capture pressure, sound cues, and MonsterOverlay presentation.
out_of_scope: Full pathfinding or authored patrol routes
New monster art or audio assets

user_decisions.decision: Proceed through Harness steps automatically and treat the recurring next-step prompt as approval to continue approved-for-implementation units.

decision_log.reason: phases/index.json has no active or blocked phase and NEXT_ACTION.md recommends MonsterRuntimeSystem.

current_state: Completed. MonsterRuntimeSystem handles event-driven monster state changes, MonsterOverlay presentation, sound cues, and capture pressure through HidingRuntimeSystem.
resume_instructions: This phase is complete. Next, start one new Harness unit for MapRuntimeSystem only if phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.
next_action: Start MapRuntimeSystem to update MapUI current room and floor state from RoomSystem.
